class.name: franka_mobile_example_controllers/MobileCartesianVelocityExampleController
class.description: The mobile cartesian velocity example controller fowards cartesian velocity commands to the mobile robot.

class.name: franka_mobile_example_controllers/MobileCartesianVelocityWithIkExampleController
class.description: The mobile cartesian velocity with IK example controller computes swerve drive commands from cartesian velocity commands and forwards them to the mobile robot.
